faq.question: How much does window replacement cost in Daly City?
faq.answer: Daly City homeowners typically invest $5,000 to $11,000 for a full window replacement project covering 10–14 windows. The city's dense rows of 1950s–1970s stucco homes — many still with original aluminum sliders — offer some of the most efficient replacement projects in San Mateo County. Single window installation starts at approximately $450.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for window replacement in Daly City?
faq.answer: Yes. Daly City requires a building permit for window replacement. Our team handles all permit applications and coordinates with the City of Daly City Building Division on your behalf.

faq.question: Which window brands does Deluxe Windows install in Daly City?
faq.answer: For Daly City's dense residential neighborhoods and foggy coastal climate, we most frequently install Milgard Tuscany vinyl for its durability and competitive pricing, Simonton for budget-conscious full-home replacements, and Anlin Del Mar for homeowners looking to upgrade to triple-pane performance and condensation resistance.

faq.question: Does Deluxe Windows serve all Daly City neighborhoods?
faq.answer: Yes — we serve all Daly City neighborhoods including Westlake, Serramonte, Crocker, Bayshore, St. Francis Heights, and all of Daly City's zip codes: 94014, 94015, 94016.
